theme: heat-pump rebates spreading through a village
title: Corridor Rebates: Budgeted Subsidies for a Heat-Pump Cascade
strategies: uniform baseline: split the budget evenly across every household; only the already-eager ones flip
cheapest-to-convert knapsack: pay each household's own self-activation cost theta_i/r_i in ascending order until the budget runs out, ignoring the network
continuation-value allocation: fund a household only for the downstream cascade it unlocks -- enter a corridor once, then spend near-threshold top-ups to walk the whole chain
corridor knapsack: treat each induced chain as an item (adopters gained vs. head + top-up cost) and pack corridors against the budget, funding heads only where the last node pays off
